title: DCS LinkStream 2.0
summary: Android-based field data collection and offline-first sync architecture.
content: Built an Android app to collect environmental sensor data with offline-first sync. Designed robust ingestion pipelines and reduced field data loss.

title: Computer Vision Defect Detection
summary: End-to-end defect detection using OpenCV and ML models.
content: Developed pipelines for preprocessing, model training, and deployment to reduce production defects.
